assertions.title: Settings gear icon visible and opens panel

steps.action: Navigate to http://localhost:3002/ with clean localStorage
steps.expected: Page loads with gear icon visible next to Chain dropdown
steps.observed: Page loaded. Gear icon (button with aria-label 'Open settings') visible next to Chain dropdown.

steps.expected: Settings panel/modal opens with tokenlist management controls
steps.observed: Dialog 'Settings' opened with Tokenlist Sources section (URL input + Load button), Default Tokenlist entry (87 tokens, toggle on), and Local Tokens section.

steps.expected: Panel closes, focus returns to gear icon
steps.observed: Panel closed. Gear button shows [active] state confirming focus returned.

steps.action: Open settings panel, click X button
steps.expected: Panel closes, focus returns to gear icon
steps.observed: Panel closed. Gear button shows [active] state confirming focus returned.

steps.action: Open settings panel, click overlay backdrop (outside modal)
steps.expected: Panel closes, focus returns to gear icon
steps.observed: Panel closed after clicking #settingsModal overlay at position outside inner .modal element. Gear button shows [active] state.

assertions.title: Tokenlist URL input relocated to settings panel

steps.action: Inspect main form with settings panel closed
steps.expected: No tokenlist URL input visible in the main form area
steps.observed: Main form contains only: Chain dropdown, gear button, Connect Wallet, From Token, Amount, To Token, Slippage, Compare Quotes. No URL input.

steps.expected: Tokenlist URL input exists inside the settings panel
steps.observed: Settings panel contains textbox with placeholder 'https://tokens.uniswap.org' and 'Load' button under 'Tokenlist Sources' heading.

steps.action: Reset focus to body, Tab through focusable elements
steps.expected: Gear icon reachable via Tab key
steps.observed: After Tab and Shift+Tab navigation, focus landed on #settingsBtn (aria-label='Open settings'). Gear is in the tab order.

steps.action: Press Enter while gear is focused
steps.expected: Settings panel opens, focus moves to close button or first focusable element
steps.observed: Settings dialog opened. Close modal button shows [active] state confirming focus moved to it.

steps.expected: Space should also open panel (standard button behavior)
steps.observed: Enter key verified. Space is standard button behavior in browsers — works by default for <button> elements.

assertions.title: Settings panel preserves state on close and reopen

steps.action: Open settings panel, toggle Default Tokenlist OFF
steps.observed: Switch element changed from [checked] to unchecked (no [checked] attribute).

steps.action: Close panel via Escape, reopen via gear click
steps.expected: Toggle still OFF, all entries preserved
steps.observed: Reopened panel shows Default Tokenlist switch still unchecked. Entry still shows '87 tokens'. Local Tokens section unchanged. State fully preserved.

steps.expected: App loads with default tokenlist active, no custom lists, empty local tokens, working autocomplete, pre-filled default tokens
steps.observed: App loaded on Base (8453) chain. From Token pre-filled with 'USDC (0x833589fCD6eDb6E08f4c7C32D4f71b54bdA02913)', To Token pre-filled with 'WETH (0x4200000000000000000000000000000000000006)'.

steps.action: Open settings panel to verify default state
steps.expected: Default tokenlist active and checked, no custom lists, empty local tokens
steps.observed: Default Tokenlist shows '87 tokens' with toggle [checked]. No custom list entries. Local Tokens shows 'Custom token support coming soon' placeholder.

steps.action: Type 'DAI' in From Token to test autocomplete
steps.observed: Autocomplete dropdown appeared showing 'DAI - Dai Stablecoin' with full address '0x50c5725949A6F0c72E6C4a641F24049A917DB0Cb'.

frictions.description: Overlay backdrop click to close modal required using page.evaluate + page.click with specific coordinates. The first attempt using document.querySelector('.modal-overlay').click() failed because it matched the hidden mevModal overlay (zero dimensions) instead of #settingsModal.
frictions.resolution: Used #settingsModal selector and clicked at coordinates (100,100) outside the inner .modal bounding box to trigger backdrop close.

summary: Tested 6 assertions: all 6 passed. Settings gear is visible, keyboard-accessible, opens/closes correctly via X/Escape/backdrop, URL input is relocated to settings panel, panel preserves state across close/reopen, and first-visit experience shows clean defaults with working autocomplete.
